summary: As of early 2023, there are no FDA-approved or authorized medications for post-exposure prophylaxis of COVID-19. Previous options like casirivimab/imdevimab and bamlanivimab/etesevimab are no longer effective or recommended due to reduced activity against new Omicron variants.

Previous options like casirivimab/imdevimab and bamlanivimab/etesevimab are no longer effective or recommended due to reduced activity against new Omicron variants.. Answer choice: A
